title: The Restored Workers Revolt
description: Pages 11–15 focus on the restored workers revolt, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the restored victims, Franky, the Tontatta, and Doflamingo's officers converge on the Smile Factory as Dressrosa's rebellion spreads.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've been dropped all the way down to outside the outer wall tower....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: As long as Pica is protecting him, we won't be able to get near Doflamingo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Before the truth of this country gets out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He plans to massacre every last person...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Like I know!! At any rate, we're get- ting out of here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There's no point going up against Doflamingo here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He'll only take us out instead!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Captain!! Up ahead!! There's something up ahead!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: They stretch as far as the eye can see!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: We can't seem to contact HQ!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Same here!! Our line to base isn't connect- ing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: We haven't even told them what happened here yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Hey, what are you doing to those civilian houses?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: It's not me!! My body, it's...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Hey, the ground's sinking! What's going on....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: It's Pica!! As long as it's made of rock, he can even control the terrain itself!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: All around Dressrosa, people are starting to indiscriminately attack those around them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: The Palace is going off somewhere on its own!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Uwaaah- HHA!! The factory is rising up from the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Ehhhh?!! What the hell is going on here?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: The ground beneath the flower field!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: It's rising up and con- suming the city!!

summary: The Restored Workers Revolt develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
